page_metadata.biotools__summary: D-EE is a distributed dimensionality reduction and visualization tool. Its distributed storage and distributed computation technique allow us to efficiently analyze large-scale single-cell data at the cost of constant time speedup.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: D-EE is a distributed dimensionality reduction and visualization tool. Its distributed storage and distributed computation technique allow us to efficiently analyze large-scale single-cell data at the cost of constant time speedup.
